summary: R2 addresses gameplay REQUEST_CHANGES by removing player-facing engineering wording from the obligation panel, relabeling the action as preparing obligation support, and adding visible District 1 troop obligation support feedback in the Results drawer after the existing command boundary is used.

tests_run.result: This repository script ran the full root Vitest suite before the target file; two unrelated long-running sim tests timed out at the default 5000 ms: tests/sim-ai-multiyear-ai-run.test.ts and tests/sim-core-m2-economy-population.test.ts. The direct focused UI command below was used for the intended coverage.

tests_run.command: pnpm exec prettier --write packages/ui/src/index.tsx packages/ui/src/i18n.ts tests/e2e/web-shell.spec.ts tests/ui-m2-district-list.test.tsx apps/web/src/styles/shell.css
tests_run.result: Formatted changed UI/test files; tests/ui-m2-district-list.test.tsx and apps/web/src/styles/shell.css were unchanged by Prettier.

tests_run.command: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/ui-m2-district-list.test.tsx
tests_run.result: Focused React/Vitest coverage passed: 1 file, 17 tests. It asserts the obligation panel uses player-facing support wording and excludes read-model/read-only/command-path/GameCommand-style jargon.

Focused Playwright web shell regression passed: 27 tests. The first shell smoke now asserts the obligation drawer has no implementation jargon, the action is Prepare obligation support, and the post-click Results drawer mentions District 1 Troop obligation support prepared.
Passed format check, lint, typecheck, and architecture boundary check.
Task registry listed successfully; M7-CORE-ACTION-LOOP-UX-001 is IN_PROGRESS.
No dependency-ready next task was printed while this task remains active.
Web production build passed. Vite reported existing chunk-size warnings.
Storybook build passed and removed .tmp/storybook-static. Vite reported existing chunk-size warnings.
Clean after committing R2 implementation, before writing this handoff.

decisions.decision: Replaced obligation panel copy that mentioned read models, read-only preview data, and command paths with in-world language about preparing available muster and campaign support.
Kept the existing M4 command boundary, but added Results drawer feedback tied to the focused District 1 troop obligation so the player is not left with only generic campaign feedback.
Did not claim the obligation is fully settled by a new mechanic; the UI says support/order is prepared and asks the player to review it before wider commitments.
No sim-core, protocol, save-format, content-source, Electron, server, telemetry, manual node battle, final art, or broader map-sync scope was changed.

risks.summary: The generic Campaign request prepared status remains visible because the UI still uses the existing M4 command submission boundary. R2 adds adjacent obligation-specific feedback to resolve the player comprehension issue without changing protocol or simulation authority.

A root pnpm test attempt failed on unrelated long-running sim tests timing out at 5000 ms before the focused UI file; pnpm check, direct focused Vitest, Playwright, Web build, and Storybook build passed.

requested_action: Review the R2 obligation wording and post-click feedback changes. If accepted, route onward per the task chain.
